# kUSBNotificationPreForcedSuspend

**Enumeration Case**

The system sends a notification prior to a forced suspend.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBNotificationPreForcedSuspend = (1 << kUSBNotificationPreForcedSuspendBit)
```
